footerHumans: Made for Humans, by Humans — with AI, for the good of humanity
homeSubtitle: Guided setup with preflight checks, permissions auditing, dependency management, and rollback support. Choose your deployment target below.
homePreflightDesc: Validates permissions, dependencies, disk space before changing anything
homeDryRunDesc: Preview every command. Rollback scripts generated alongside each step.
homeHardeningDesc: Security checklist with observability defaults, no-PII logging, and firewall rules
patternsSubtitle: Starter templates for ClawXXX agents designed around empathy, clarity, and care. Each pattern embodies a different way AI can make the world feel more like home.
patternsFooter: These patterns are starting points — adapt them to your community, your values, your world.
marketplaceSubtitle: MCP-compatible connections, AI provider skills, and community packages — install with one command, configure with standard YAML.
marketplaceFooter: All skills follow MCP (Model Context Protocol) standards. Configs are portable across any MCP-compatible host.
patStorytellerTag: Making complexity feel like a story
patTeacherTag: Learning at your own pace, with encouragement
humansBehind: Behind every line of code, there's a person who cared enough to write it.
humansBobDesc: Believes every human deserves technology that respects them
humansKenDesc: Working to make governance-as-code accessible to everyone
humansMissionText: The AiGovOps Foundation works to make AI governance accessible, transparent, and human-centered. We believe in governance-as-code, human-in-the-loop decision making, and empowering disadvantaged communities through open-source tools.
humansWelcome: If you're reading this, you're one of us. Welcome home.
preflightSelectHost: Select a host target and click "Run Preflight" to execute checks. Results stream live and are recorded in the immutable audit log.
releasesSubtitle: Supply-chain drift, governance health, and release history
releasesGratitude: Thank you for building in the open
releasesGratitudeDesc: Every release is a gift to the community.
celebPreflight1: Preflight complete — your system is ready.
celebPreflight2: All checks passed. You're set up for success.
celebInstall1: Installation complete. You just made it safer.
notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
mktNoResultsHint: Try a different query or browse all categories.
mktDonationDesc: Every skill in this marketplace is free and open-source. If ClawXXX helps your team, consider supporting the AiGovOps Foundation with a small donation — pick your local favorite.
mktDonationPowered: Powered by Stripe. All donations go directly to the AiGovOps Foundation.
mktCuratorsDesc: Have a skill to share? Reach out to our curators or submit directly.
mktSubmitSkillDesc: Share your MCP package with the community
